comments.text: Very nice doku, thank you for showing us how ppl live there.  Beautiful nature, and a rich culture with friendly people, blessings from germany

comments.author: @Channel16-j1l
comments.text: Wow, this gives a real look at Myanmar's culture and spirit. Makes me think about how much more there is to learn about places like this.

replies.author: @eonatlas
replies.text: Thank you for the kind words, I'm so glad the documentary resonated with you! ❤

replies.author: @nilarsawmyanmar9031
replies.text: I am proud and satisfied being as a Myanmar (BAAMA) . Hopefully we can adjust these heartless n roude of Modern lifestyle and politices.

comments.author: @GregPetaSmith
comments.text: I love Myanmar. My father’s family are Burmese and my father was born there. We were fortunate enough to visit in 2018 and loved every moment. My heart breaks for the Myanmar people now with all the trouble from both war and natural disasters. I’m curious though, you mentioned the balloons over Bagan being tradition and cultural? This doesn’t seem correct… all the balloon companies are owned and run by foreigners and are purely commercial!

replies.author: @eonatlas
replies.text: Thank you for sharing your personal connection to Myanmar and for the clarification regarding the balloon industry!

comments.author: @AnnoyedJigsawPuzzle-qy6gr
comments.text: I definitely didn’t have manifesting figured out. I kept trying different techniques, getting nowhere and wondering what I was doing wrong. Vera Hart’s archetype quiz helped me understand that I was using methods that simply didn’t match me. Nothing magically changed overnight, but it finally gave me some direction. It’s free, so you might as well try it.

replies.text: You people should appreciate Myanmar people, who have been humanitarian hosting for many years illegally trespassing, and suffering civil war from east and west Bangladesh. We given them shelters, foods and temporary place for living. But now, you people are betrayed to the Myanmar people, who's your saviour, during your people's difficult time. Right now Myanmar country has their own problems, and can't be able to accept of your people. Don't stir up trouble in Myanmar country. Go wherever you are.
